creator: pfrench@firstcallgroup.co.uk
text:
The comments for USER_LDT in LINT state that it is required by WINE
	and ports/aviafile, but nothing else. The latest port of xmovie also
	appears to require this option.

Fix: 

Line should include graphics/xmovie as well as graphics/aviplay
How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to run xmovie-1.6.1 under GENERIC on 4.3. Fails. Build
	kernel with USER_LDT included. Run xmovie under new kernel. Works.
